name: pandoc-manuscript-tools
description: Local VS Code helpers for Pandoc Markdown labels, cross references, math hovers, and outline symbols.

scripts.check: node --check src/extension.js && node --check src/constants.js && node --check src/configuration.js && node --check src/vscodeUtils.js && node --check src/workspaceIndex.js && node --check src/providers.js && node --check src/mathJaxRenderer.js && node --check src/paragraphTranslator.js && node --check src/docxBuild.js && node --check src/parser.js && node --check scripts/profile-test-md.js
scripts.package:vsix: npm run check && npm run bundle && npm run check:bundle && vsce package
scripts.publish:marketplace: npm run check && npm run bundle && npm run check:bundle && vsce publish
scripts.publish:patch: npm run check && npm run bundle && npm run check:bundle && vsce publish patch

commands.title: Pandoc Manuscript Tools: Build DOCX and Open in Word

pandocManuscriptTools.enableDiagnostics.description: Report undefined Pandoc cross references and duplicate labels in open Markdown documents.

pandocManuscriptTools.includeWorkspaceRe.description: Preload Markdown files in the current workspace for the index cache. Definitions, references, completions, and diagnostics remain scoped to the active document.

pandocManuscriptTools.includeLabelSymbol.description: Add equation, figure, and table labels as nested outline symbols below their nearest heading.

pandocManuscriptTools.enableInlineMathPa.description: Show a paragraph-level hover preview when hovering over a Markdown paragraph that contains inline math.

pandocManuscriptTools.inlineMathParagrap.description: Maximum paragraph length, in characters, that can show an inline-math paragraph hover preview.

pandocManuscriptTools.enableParagraphHov.description: Show a Google Translate-powered Chinese translation for eligible English paragraph hovers.

pandocManuscriptTools.paragraphHoverTran.description: Maximum English paragraph length, in characters, that can request a paragraph hover translation.
Target language code for paragraph hover translations sent to Google Translate, for example zh or zh-TW.
